title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Hittite-Egyptian Treaty (Full)
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Hittite-Egyptian Treaty (Full).

translation.text: From 'Hittite-Egyptian Treaty (Full)': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
